👤 About Me

Scholar · Learner · Creator

Combining Islamic Values with Modern Technology — building purposeful digital experiences.

Assalamu Alaikum! I am Asma Umar — an aspiring AI-Powered Web Developer and Islamic learner passionate about combining modern technology with meaningful values.

With a background in Dars-e-Nizami, I bring deep knowledge of Arabic, Tafsir-ul-Quran, Ahadees, and Seerat-un-Nabi ﷺ — now blending these with HTML, CSS & JavaScript at As-Sa'adah Institute.

My goal: create impactful digital experiences that inspire learning, creativity, and positive change — rooted in Islamic ethics and technological excellence.
